description: Calls and arity (issue #63), the #9 callee-span finding: `ol-unknown-command`'s source_span must cover ONLY the callee token `fowad`, not the whole parenthesized call or its argument `100`. `forward` is a Turtle & Rendering primitive not yet registered with the checker at core-language-only (see unknown-command.test.mjs), so `fowad` is unknown with no suggestion.
